text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Nishino Flower chatting with one of her
classmates in the hallway.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
What is it, Nishino? Are you tired? How about a
nice pat on the back?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You're always working so hard! ♪ What a good
girl!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? That's not the reaction I was expecting. You
usually blush and get all giggly when I do that.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
O-oh... I was just thinking about how nice it is,
getting pampered like this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower's busy race schedule must be
taking a toll on her. Adjusting it might be a good
idea.
